name: CyberPower CP1200AVR AVR 1200VA/720W Mini-Tower UPS System - Simulated Sine Wave - 10x NEMA 5-15P (5 Surge, 5 Surge + Battery Backup) - Line Interactive - RJ45 Network Protection - RG6 Coax Protection - USB & Serial Management Ports (CP1200AVR)
shortName: CyberPower CP1200AVR AVR 1200VA/720W Mini-Tower UPS System
description: CyberPower 1200VA/720W mini-tower UPS with AVR and dual protection for network and coax connections.
